# LensExtractionProvider

Extract implicit lens references from StorageProgram instruction trees , converting string based storage access patterns into first class typed StateLens values for traceability and analysis

## Commands

### analyze
Walk the instruction tree and convert each get put del merge 
 instruction into an explicit StateLens reference . Instructions 
 that already use getLens putLens modifyLens are passed through . 
 Returns extracted lenses as JSON and a per lens access pattern 
 classification ( read , write , or read write ) .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string)
